entity.name: ProjectType

boolean.name: requiresTask
boolean.title: Requires Task
boolean.help: Does this project type use tasks?

boolean.name: requiresExpense
boolean.title: Requires Expense
boolean.help: Does this project type use expenses?

boolean.name: requiresValidation
boolean.title: Requires Validation
boolean.help: Does this project type have any item which requires validation?

boolean.name: requiresConfirmation
boolean.title: Requires confirmation
boolean.help: Does this project type require review confirmation before it can be invoiced

boolean.name: requiresRecordInvoicingData
boolean.title: Requires record invoicing data
boolean.help: Does this project type need a record invoicing data tab (generally for subcontractor projects)

boolean.name: isSingleUserProject
boolean.title: Single user project
boolean.help: When enabled, this project type is dedicated to a single user. Only the 'Assigned to' field is relevant, and will always have as only member the 'Assigned to' user.

integer.name: defaultExpenseCategory
integer.help: The default expense category for this project type
